policy.note: This brief prepares owner questions only. It does not record decisions, approve public display, promote assets or modify manifests.

review_cards.label: Batch A: Villa Savoye Image Candidates
review_cards.intent: Decide whether any Villa Savoye image candidate should enter a deeper source/credit review.
review_cards.recommended_owner_question: Soll Villa Savoye Bildmaterial nur blockiert bleiben, oder soll genau ein Bild in eine separate Quellen-/Credit-Pruefung?
recommended_stance: If no public preview is needed now, leave all three blocked.
If a preview is needed, open a separate source-basis review before any public-ready change.
review_cards.decision_effect: No public-ready changes are allowed from this card; any positive direction opens or confirms a separate reviewed step.

review_cards.label: Batch B: Villa Savoye Derived Files
review_cards.intent: Keep generated or derived Villa Savoye files from becoming public-facing without source-basis review.
review_cards.recommended_owner_question: Sollen alle abgeleiteten Villa-Dateien blockiert bleiben, bis Plan-/Modell-Herkunft sauber belegt ist?
recommended_stance: Record `keep_blocked` unless the owner explicitly starts a source-basis review for this batch.
review_cards.decision_effect: No public-ready changes are allowed from this card; any positive direction opens or confirms a separate reviewed step.

review_cards.label: Batch C: Model Promotion Confirmation
review_cards.intent: Prevent diagrammatic massing/model studies from being presented as measured or source-complete architecture models.
review_cards.recommended_owner_question: Sollen die vorhandenen Modelle weiterhin als diagrammatische Studien blockiert bleiben, bis Modellqualitaet und Quellenbasis geprueft sind?
recommended_stance: Defer promotion until a separate model-quality and source-confidence review exists.
review_cards.decision_effect: No public-ready changes are allowed from this card; any positive direction opens or confirms a separate reviewed step.

review_cards.label: Batch D: Sogn Benedetg Source Gap
review_cards.intent: Keep the Sogn Benedetg lane honest until the larger private library roots are visible.
review_cards.recommended_owner_question: Soll Sogn Benedetg link-only bleiben, bis der echte private Bibliotheks-Root sichtbar ist?
recommended_stance: Keep open until the large OneDrive/book/ETH/HSLU library can be indexed or mounted.
review_cards.decision_effect: No public-ready changes are allowed from this card; any positive direction opens or confirms a separate reviewed step.

review_cards.label: Batch E: KosmoAsset Human Reviews
review_cards.intent: Review local-only study assets for Blender, DXF, web and future ArchiCAD workflows without public promotion.
review_cards.recommended_owner_question: Welche lokalen Study-Assets sollen ein Human Review bekommen, ohne Public-Promotion zu erlauben?
recommended_stance: Use `needs-review` until a named reviewer has opened the local files.
Use `block-public` for anything that should remain private/local even after local approval.
review_cards.decision_effect: No public-ready changes are allowed from this card; any positive direction opens or confirms a separate reviewed step.

items.title: Villa Savoye Concrete Frame Material Study
Villa Savoye Five Points Diagram Kit
Sogn Benedetg Wood Shingle Material Study
Sogn Benedetg Light Band Detail Study
Ingenbohl Concrete Core and Frame Study

next_actions: Present one review card at a time to the owner.
If owner is unavailable, keep safe defaults and do not apply decisions.
After owner records reference choices, run npm run kosmo:owner-decision-session-check.
After asset reviewer choices, rerun npm run kosmo:asset-full-review -- --library examples/kosmo-assets/kosmoreferences-pilot-seed-library-2026-06-13/library.json.
Always rerun npm run kosmo:data-lane-sweep and npm run kosmo:data-lane-command-router after decision edits.
